mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question_test_case ( question_id, case_index, `input`, `expected_output`, is_public, case_type, weight, generation_source, version, content_hash, time_limit, memory_limit, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{questionId}, #{caseIndex}, #{input, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{expectedOutput, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{isPublic}, #{caseType}, #{weight}, #{generationSource}, #{version}, #{contentHash}, #{timeLimit}, #{memoryLimit}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )

UPDATE question_test_case SET question_id = #{questionId}, `input` = #{input, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, `expected_output` = #{expectedOutput, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, is_public = #{isPublic}, case_type = #{caseType}, weight = #{weight}, generation_source = #{generationSource}, version = #{version}, time_limit = #{timeLimit}, memory_limit = #{memoryLimit}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE case_id = #{caseId}
mapper.select: SELECT case_id as caseId, question_id as questionId, case_index as caseIndex, input, expected_output as expectedOutput, is_public as isPublic, case_type as caseType, weight, generation_source as generationSource, version, content_hash as contentHash, time_limit as timeLimit, memory_limit as memoryLimit, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM question_test_case WHERE content_hash = #{contentHash} ORDER BY case_index ASC
